calendar.matters:
Petition Confirming Title To Trust Property
Off Calendar Mar-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Woods making a special appearance for Gregory Rocca on behalf of Juantina Malone.

Mr. Woods stated that all of the children are aware of the situation and that no objections have been made. The Court stated that it is willing to confirm the San Jose Avenue property and the first Napa property as trust property but not the second Napa property. The Court granted in part the Petition Confirming Title to Trust Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
